channel.title: Web Development on Maven AI
channel.description: Recent content in Web Development on Maven AI

item.title: CSS Grid vs Flexbox for Mobile: When Flexbox Fails (And Grid Wins)
item.description: Flexbox wraps unevenly on mobile. CSS Grid gives you control. Here's when to use which, with real examples from production.

item.title: Mobile-First CSS: Why Container Padding Matters More Than You Think
item.description: How reducing container padding from 2rem to 1rem on mobile gave users 50% more usable screen space - and why mobile-first matters.
